scripts.seed:all: npx tsx seedResearchAreas.ts both && npx tsx seedDepartments.ts both
scripts.seed:dev: npx tsx seedResearchAreas.ts dev && npx tsx seedDepartments.ts dev
scripts.seed:prod: npx tsx seedResearchAreas.ts prod && npx tsx seedDepartments.ts prod
scripts.migrate:v4:identity: npx tsx BackfillV4FacultyMembers.ts && npx tsx BackfillV4StudentProfiles.ts && npx tsx BackfillV4ResearchGroupMembers.ts
scripts.migrate:v4:all: npx tsx BackfillV4FacultyMembers.ts && npx tsx BackfillV4StudentProfiles.ts && npx tsx BackfillV4ResearchGroupMembers.ts && npx tsx BackfillV4PaperGraph.ts && npx tsx BackfillV4Grants.ts && npx tsx BackfillV4ResearchGroupStats.ts
